mapper.insert: INSERT INTO generated_file_version (id, file_id, version_number, title, object_key, section_count, change_log, status, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{fileId}, #{versionNumber}, #{title}, #{objectKey}, #{sectionCount}, #{changeLog}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM generated_file_version WHERE file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY version_number DESC
SELECT * FROM generated_file_version WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND status = 'draft' ORDER BY version_number DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version_number), 0) FROM generated_file_version WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
SELECT * FROM generated_file_version WHERE file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY version_number ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM generated_file_version WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM generated_file_version WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND status = 'draft'
mapper.update: UPDATE generated_file_version SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
